name: skills
description: Karan Pinto's curated skill marketplace for Utopia Capital teams and fellows

plugins.name: utopia-dd-pack
plugins.description: Technical due diligence and investment evaluation — assess whether a startup's tech works, scales, and is secure

plugins.name: utopia-design-pack
plugins.description: Full UI/UX design toolkit — 32 skills spanning planning, building, critiquing, and polishing frontend interfaces

plugins.name: utopia-deploy-pack
plugins.description: Ship to production — Railway, Vercel, CI/CD, monitoring, and deployment readiness

plugins.name: utopia-ml-pack
plugins.description: Machine learning and AI workflows — HuggingFace training, evals, datasets, and Transformers.js

plugins.name: utopia-content-pack
